title: 識人讀時裝的入嚟!! 登記做功能界別(紡織及製衣)選民!!!

replies.msg:
原來登記做呢個界別的選民門檻好簡單, 只要你係相關degree/ high dip 畢業, 加兩年相關工作經驗就得!!

首先根據選舉事務處指引 (https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf) 第15頁附錄乙, 「你是下列類別的人士或團體, 便符合資格登記: 1(a)(3) 有權在香港紡織及服裝學會有限公司的大會上表決的該會會員」.

可能你做咗廿年時裝都未聽過有呢個學會存在, 咁係因為建制派唔會咁傻叫你入會去踢走佢. 你可以試下入佢個網頁睇下入會資格: http://www.hkita.org/

Member (MHKITA) Member shall satisfy any of the following sets of requirements:-
(i) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience and (2) who have passed all examinations of the Institution including dissertation;
(ii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience or not less than 1 year of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation and (2) who hold Honours degree or higher diploma approved by the Institution;
(iii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 5 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation, (2) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution and (3) who hold appropriate Honours degree or equivalent qualification relating to textile and apparel; or
(iv) Any persons (1) who have not less than 10 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience, (2) who have no formal qualification in the field of textile and apparel but (3) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution.

要留意, 並非所有級別的會藉都有投票權, Student/Graduate嗰類唔會有. 本人查詢過HKITA, 該會回覆 Member (MHKITA) 屬於Voting Member, 所以唔好貪會費平就申請其他級別.

跟住就下載申請表 http://www.hkita.org/ICMServlet/download/44-325-1126/Membership%20Form%20(Individual)_14092018.pdf , 填妥後連支票寄回「HKITA, 63 Tai Yip Street, Kowloon Bay, Kowloon, Hong Kong」, 信封面註明「HKITA Membership Application」.

會費為: HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$500 (一年年費) = HK$600 或
HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$5,000 (終身年費) = HK$5,100

可能你會覺得會費好貴, 但係對比建築師 ($2,400/一年), 服裝學會$500一年算好平喇. 嫌貴就考慮下終身會藉, 反正功能界別好大機會到你死嗰刻都仲存在緊. 同埋記得交會費, 欠交會費最壞下場會係被DQ. 會費可以用作扣稅, 唔好益政府!

最後就去填政府份form REO-41 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/form/REO-41(C).pdf
喺 「功能界別」同 「選舉委員會界別分組」兩項都填哂 「紡織及製衣界」.
我哋除咗踢走鍾國斌, 仲要踢走埋嗰18個自動當選的選委!

quote.msg:
原來登記做呢個界別的選民門檻好簡單, 只要你係相關degree/ high dip 畢業, 加兩年相關工作經驗就得!!

首先根據選舉事務處指引 (https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf) 第15頁附錄乙, 「你是下列類別的人士或團體, 便符合資格登記: 1(a)(3) 有權在香港紡織及服裝學會有限公司的大會上表決的該會會員」.

可能你做咗廿年時裝都未聽過有呢個學會存在, 咁係因為建制派唔會咁傻叫你入會去踢走佢. 你可以試下入佢個網頁睇下入會資格: http://www.hkita.org/

Member (MHKITA) Member shall satisfy any of the following sets of requirements:-
(i) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience and (2) who have passed all examinations of the Institution including dissertation;
(ii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience or not less than 1 year of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation and (2) who hold Honours degree or higher diploma approved by the Institution;
(iii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 5 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation, (2) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution and (3) who hold appropriate Honours degree or equivalent qualification relating to textile and apparel; or
(iv) Any persons (1) who have not less than 10 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience, (2) who have no formal qualification in the field of textile and apparel but (3) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution.

要留意, 並非所有級別的會藉都有投票權, Student/Graduate嗰類唔會有. 本人查詢過HKITA, 該會回覆 Member (MHKITA) 屬於Voting Member, 所以唔好貪會費平就申請其他級別.

跟住就下載申請表 http://www.hkita.org/ICMServlet/download/44-325-1126/Membership%20Form%20(Individual)_14092018.pdf , 填妥後連支票寄回「HKITA, 63 Tai Yip Street, Kowloon Bay, Kowloon, Hong Kong」, 信封面註明「HKITA Membership Application」.

會費為: HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$500 (一年年費) = HK$600 或
HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$5,000 (終身年費) = HK$5,100

可能你會覺得會費好貴, 但係對比建築師 ($2,400/一年), 服裝學會$500一年算好平喇. 嫌貴就考慮下終身會藉, 反正功能界別好大機會到你死嗰刻都仲存在緊. 同埋記得交會費, 欠交會費最壞下場會係被DQ. 會費可以用作扣稅, 唔好益政府!

最後就去填政府份form REO-41 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/form/REO-41(C).pdf
喺 「功能界別」同 「選舉委員會界別分組」兩項都填哂 「紡織及製衣界」.
我哋除咗踢走鍾國斌, 仲要踢走埋嗰18個自動當選的選委!

四個學會的幹事九成係建制

最後上屆姚松炎係贏過（雖然因爲宣誓而被DQ）
唔可以因為怕失敗而放棄爭取
議席同自由唔會喺天自己跌落嚟

建測規園界呢個我覺得係幾個别例子，我查實唔熟呢行可能我諗錯都唔定，不過以我理解，建測呢行入嗰幾個會真係一個可以用嚟揾食嘅專業資格嚟，冇嗰啲會席就冇資格畫龜，嗰啲會真係行內嘅專業認證唔係阿豬阿狗都入得嗰隻。
我估會計界應該都係呢類情況，呢類界别我同意係有得做嘅。
不過以我理解製衣紡織 (IT 都好似係，除非唔係) 嗰啲濕尻學會應該同個行業嘅專業認證冇乜關係，唔會好似建測規嗰啲，學會資格等同畫龜嘅資格，呢啲學會建制陣營可以好容易揾啲公園廢老阿豬阿狗入去揍人頭，個學會係建制地頭，佢話啲阿豬阿狗有資格入會外人唔會吹得佢漲，呢啲學會同個行業本身嘅專業運作根本冇乜關係，佢哋喺呢啲學會要揍人頭做馬易做過嗰啲一屋幾十姓嘅種票好多。
俾錢入呢啲濕尻學會同捐錢支持建制冇乜太大分别，外人真金白銀科水入去同佢圍內揍人頭根本冇得鬥。

首先我哋研究下HKITA的人數，由於網頁冇相關數據，就由選民登記人數去估下：
https://www.voterregistration.gov.hk/chi/statistic20183.html
根據政府資料，紡織業的選民以團體票同個人票劃分，人數分別係1,862同58。因為登記個人票的只有一個途徑 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf，所以可以肯定嗰58票都係來自HKITA。當登記率好差，得1/3人登記做選民，MHKITA或上的Voting Member都係得百幾人，一屆polyu hkdi vtc的畢業人數已經多過佢。

只要你哋一大班人入咗去，基本上已經夠人數操控個學會，到時嫌會費貴咪減會費，嫌會長太建制咪自己去選 (反正個學會冇乜嘢做)。

整左個EXCEL, 大家要整合所有29個功能界別 (連超區) 選民資格幫手UPDATE:

https://lihkg.com/thread/1243657/

首先搞清楚BASIC CONCEPT:
有分
a) 個人票 - 入左傳統功能界別就無得投超區 (超區有一百萬票, 傳統得幾百到幾千, 有得揀一定係傳統)
b) 團體票 ( 團體可以係組織, 公司, 機構, 公會等等), 即係成個團體有一票, 個團體會委任一個人代表成個團體

每個界別組成同坃法都唔同, 有啲有個人, 有啲有團體, 有啲兩樣都有, 請睇上面EXCEL,

1) 再講多次，功能組別唔係一時三刻可以做選民，因為大部分都要成為左會員12個月/團體成立左12個月, 先可以登記做選民，所以下年好大機會趕唔切, 不過各位巴打可以做就盡快做, 因為今日做，2021年就可以係選委選舉投票，間接影響2022特首，今日唔做，慢慢淡左，4年後都係會趕唔切
加左"選舉委員會界別"分組, 呢啲分組係 "全票制", 即係話, 法律界分組有30 席, 你就可以投30票, 即係話 一係全建制, 一係全泛民,
下面講緊嘅界別 (EXCEL 黃色), 加埋有 581席, 再加非建制立法會議員, 所以, 依家開始一定要做

2) 種票係犯法, 但係所有界別嘅資格都係公開, 得就得, 唔得唔好勉強
3) 本身泛民已有既功能組別要keep番, 因為唔一定十拿九穩, 建制會不斷放入去搶
4) 無論如何都要投哂2票 (地區+功能)

邊D界別可以增加團體票 (eg 成立新機構), 就咁睇好似:

b. 體育界
https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=578339132339132
2. 勞工界 - 開工會 - 最少7個同行業的人, 每年要核數,交報表
https://lihkg.com/thread/1243403
3. 飲食界
- 所有食牌持有人, (可公司 / 個人)

邊D界可以搵多D個人票.例如
1. 工程界
2. 建築、測量、都市規劃及園境界
3. 地產及建造界
4. 進出口界
5. 紡織及製衣界
6. 批發及零售界

原來登記做呢個界別的選民門檻好簡單, 只要你係相關degree/ high dip 畢業, 加兩年相關工作經驗就得!!

首先根據選舉事務處指引 (https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf) 第15頁附錄乙, 「你是下列類別的人士或團體, 便符合資格登記: 1(a)(3) 有權在香港紡織及服裝學會有限公司的大會上表決的該會會員」.

可能你做咗廿年時裝都未聽過有呢個學會存在, 咁係因為建制派唔會咁傻叫你入會去踢走佢. 你可以試下入佢個網頁睇下入會資格: http://www.hkita.org/

Member (MHKITA) Member shall satisfy any of the following sets of requirements:-
(i) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience and (2) who have passed all examinations of the Institution including dissertation;
(ii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience or not less than 1 year of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation and (2) who hold Honours degree or higher diploma approved by the Institution;
(iii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 5 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation, (2) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution and (3) who hold appropriate Honours degree or equivalent qualification relating to textile and apparel; or
(iv) Any persons (1) who have not less than 10 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience, (2) who have no formal qualification in the field of textile and apparel but (3) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution.

要留意, 並非所有級別的會藉都有投票權, Student/Graduate嗰類唔會有. 本人查詢過HKITA, 該會回覆 Member (MHKITA) 屬於Voting Member, 所以唔好貪會費平就申請其他級別.

跟住就下載申請表 http://www.hkita.org/ICMServlet/download/44-325-1126/Membership%20Form%20(Individual)_14092018.pdf , 填妥後連支票寄回「HKITA, 63 Tai Yip Street, Kowloon Bay, Kowloon, Hong Kong」, 信封面註明「HKITA Membership Application」.

會費為: HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$500 (一年年費) = HK$600 或
HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$5,000 (終身年費) = HK$5,100

可能你會覺得會費好貴, 但係對比建築師 ($2,400/一年), 服裝學會$500一年算好平喇. 嫌貴就考慮下終身會藉, 反正功能界別好大機會到你死嗰刻都仲存在緊. 同埋記得交會費, 欠交會費最壞下場會係被DQ. 會費可以用作扣稅, 唔好益政府!

最後就去填政府份form REO-41 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/form/REO-41(C).pdf
喺 「功能界別」同 「選舉委員會界別分組」兩項都填哂 「紡織及製衣界」.
我哋除咗踢走鍾國斌, 仲要踢走埋嗰18個自動當選的選委!

原來登記做呢個界別的選民門檻好簡單, 只要你係相關degree/ high dip 畢業, 加兩年相關工作經驗就得!!

首先根據選舉事務處指引 (https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf) 第15頁附錄乙, 「你是下列類別的人士或團體, 便符合資格登記: 1(a)(3) 有權在香港紡織及服裝學會有限公司的大會上表決的該會會員」.

可能你做咗廿年時裝都未聽過有呢個學會存在, 咁係因為建制派唔會咁傻叫你入會去踢走佢. 你可以試下入佢個網頁睇下入會資格: http://www.hkita.org/

Member (MHKITA) Member shall satisfy any of the following sets of requirements:-
(i) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience and (2) who have passed all examinations of the Institution including dissertation;
(ii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 2 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience or not less than 1 year of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation and (2) who hold Honours degree or higher diploma approved by the Institution;
(iii) Any persons (1) who have not less than 5 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience after graduation, (2) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution and (3) who hold appropriate Honours degree or equivalent qualification relating to textile and apparel; or
(iv) Any persons (1) who have not less than 10 years of textile and apparel or related professional experience, (2) who have no formal qualification in the field of textile and apparel but (3) who have completed a diploma program of the Institution.

要留意, 並非所有級別的會藉都有投票權, Student/Graduate嗰類唔會有. 本人查詢過HKITA, 該會回覆 Member (MHKITA) 屬於Voting Member, 所以唔好貪會費平就申請其他級別.

跟住就下載申請表 http://www.hkita.org/ICMServlet/download/44-325-1126/Membership%20Form%20(Individual)_14092018.pdf , 填妥後連支票寄回「HKITA, 63 Tai Yip Street, Kowloon Bay, Kowloon, Hong Kong」, 信封面註明「HKITA Membership Application」.

會費為: HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$500 (一年年費) = HK$600 或
HK$100 (入會手續費) + HK$5,000 (終身年費) = HK$5,100

可能你會覺得會費好貴, 但係對比建築師 ($2,400/一年), 服裝學會$500一年算好平喇. 嫌貴就考慮下終身會藉, 反正功能界別好大機會到你死嗰刻都仲存在緊. 同埋記得交會費, 欠交會費最壞下場會係被DQ. 會費可以用作扣稅, 唔好益政府!

最後就去填政府份form REO-41 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/form/REO-41(C).pdf
喺 「功能界別」同 「選舉委員會界別分組」兩項都填哂 「紡織及製衣界」.

首先我哋研究下HKITA的人數，由於網頁冇相關數據，就由選民登記人數去估下：
https://www.voterregistration.gov.hk/chi/statistic20183.html
根據政府資料，紡織業的選民以團體票同個人票劃分，人數分別係1,862同58。因為登記個人票的只有一個途徑 https://www.reo.gov.hk/pdf/gn/tg_c.pdf，所以可以肯定嗰58票都係來自HKITA。當登記率好差，得1/3人登記做選民，MHKITA或上的Voting Member都係得百幾人，一屆polyu hkdi vtc的畢業人數已經多過佢。

只要你哋一大班人入咗去，基本上已經夠人數操控個學會，到時嫌會費貴咪減會費，嫌會長太建制咪自己去選 (反正個學會冇乜嘢做)。

最緊要係試咗先，因為根本冇幾多個界別有得玩，勞工界嗰d仲高難度啦。以建制班人的平均智商都玩到，點解我哋唔試下玩？ 總之要廢除功能組別，首先就要喺功能組別攞過半數議席。
